description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural brown wood grain finish. The front features an open design with multiple compartments: a large vertical section with a metal hanging rod for clothes, three open shelves of varying heights, and three pull-out drawers with metallic handles. The sides and back are solid wood panels, providing structural support and a clean, finished appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for storing clothing, accessories, or other personal items. The design is modern and practical, making it ideal for use in urban apartments, offices, or garages.
description: A tall, brown wooden wardrobe with open shelves, a hanging rod, and three drawers with metal handles. Its modern, functional design is ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing open compartments, a hanging rod, three shelves, and three drawers with handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel with visible wood grain, no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel covering the entire back.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid wood panel, mirroring the left side, no visible features.
